description: Web application that helps facility managers optimize building energy use across zones via forecasting, recommendations, and automated controls. Implemented one use case at a time using the 4-template T1-T4 prompt pipeline.

usecases.name: RegisterBuildingProfile
usecases.description: Facility manager registers a building with zones, devices, and operating schedules.
usecases.evidence: 17/17 scenarios pass via Behave; 3 T4 cycles resolved (Pydantic 422 vs service 400; duplicate zone-name validation; drop unique constraint on buildings.name). Regression 40/40 across UC1+UC2+UC3 (post UC2 expansion, 2026-05-11). See docs/UC1/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: ImportOccupancySchedule
usecases.description: Facility manager imports an occupancy schedule via CSV upload with row-level validation and atomic save.
usecases.evidence: 16/16 scenarios pass via Behave (suite expanded with S08-S16 on 2026-05-11; no T4 needed). Regression 40/40 across UC1+UC2+UC3. See docs/UC2/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: ForecastZoneDemand
usecases.description: Scheduler-triggered forecast of zone-level energy demand using historical occupancy and weather data via a scikit-learn model.
usecases.evidence: 7/7 scenarios pass via Behave on first run; no T4 needed. Regression 40/40 across UC1+UC2+UC3 (post UC2 expansion, 2026-05-11). See docs/UC3/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: RecommendHVACSetpointChanges
usecases.description: Facility manager receives HVAC setpoint change recommendations derived from current forecasts and comfort constraints.
usecases.evidence: 17/17 scenarios pass via Behave on first run; no T4 needed. Regression 67/67 across UC1+UC2+UC3+UC4. See docs/UC4/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: ApplyApprovedEnergyPlan
usecases.description: Facility manager applies an approved energy plan, dispatching setpoint changes to zone controllers.
usecases.evidence: 17/17 scenarios pass via Behave; no T4 cycle required (only step-decorator ordering tweak during T3). Regression 84/84 across UC1+UC2+UC3+UC4+UC5. See docs/UC5/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: AdaptPlanToOccupancyChange
usecases.description: Occupancy data service triggers an adaptive update to the active energy plan when zone occupancy deviates from forecast.

usecases.name: DetectComfortViolationRisk
usecases.description: Scheduler detects upcoming comfort violation risk for a zone and surfaces a warning to the facility manager.
usecases.evidence: 17/17 scenarios pass via Behave on first run; no T4 needed. Regression 118/118 across UC1+UC2+UC3+UC4+UC5+UC6+UC7. See docs/UC7/acceptance_status.md.

usecases.name: ExplainRecommendation
usecases.description: Facility manager requests an explanation for a specific recommendation, returned via the Claude API adapter.

usecases.name: GenerateDailySavingsReport
usecases.description: Facility manager generates a daily energy savings report comparing actual vs baseline consumption.

usecases.name: HandleSensorDataOutage
usecases.description: Monitoring service handles sensor data outages by flagging affected zones and falling back to last-known good state.
